---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-01"
---
```{r}
set.seed(100)

reps <- 7
ntrt <- 8
nsim <- 1000
var <- 0.6

generate_rcbd <- function(reps, ntrt,
                          mu = 0,
                          sd_block = 5,
                          sd_error = 10) {

  dat <- expand.grid(
    Rep = factor(1:reps),
    Rootstock = factor(1:ntrt)
  )

  beta_j <- rnorm(reps, mean = 0, sd = sd_block)
  names(beta_j) <- levels(dat$Rep)

  eps <- rnorm(nrow(dat), mean = 0, sd = sd_error)

  dat$y <- mu +
           beta_j[dat$Rep] +
           eps

  dat
}

p_values <- numeric(nsim)

for (s in 1:nsim) {

  dat <- generate_rcbd(
    reps = reps,
    ntrt = ntrt
  )

  fit <- aov(y ~ Rootstock + Rep, data = dat)

  p_values[s] <- summary(fit)[[1]]["Rootstock", "Pr(>F)"]
}

# Estimated Type I error rate
mean(p_values < 0.05)
```
